module.name: alert
module.description: Colored alert banner with a leading glyph

snippet.label: Alert (info)
snippet.text: <!-- @alert type: info --> This is an informational message. <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: Alert (success)
snippet.text: <!-- @alert type: success --> The operation completed successfully. <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: Alert (warning)
snippet.text: <!-- @alert type: warning --> Be careful with this action. <!-- @end -->

snippet.label: Alert (danger)
snippet.text: <!-- @alert type: danger --> This action is destructive and cannot be undone. <!-- @end -->
